mapper.select: SELECT announcement_id, title, message, is_active, display_start_date, display_end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM admin_announcements WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND display_start_date <= NOW() AND (display_end_date IS NULL OR display_end_date >= NOW()) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT announcement_id, title, message, is_active, display_start_date, display_end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM admin_announcements WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC, announcement_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_announcements WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT announcement_id, title, message, is_active, display_start_date, display_end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM admin_announcements WHERE announcement_id = #{announcementId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_announcements ( title, message, is_active, display_start_date, display_end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{message}, #{isActive}, #{displayStartDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{displayEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, false) )
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_announcements SET title = #{title}, message = #{message}, is_active = #{isActive}, display_start_date = #{displayStartDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, display_end_date = #{displayEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE announcement_id = #{announcementId} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE admin_announcements SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE announcement_id = #{announcementId} AND is_deleted = false
